query: Summarize this paper into a structured Markdown memo with strengths, limitations, and next reads.
Write detailed reading notes for these two papers and save one Markdown file per paper.
why: Batch request for separate per-paper summary files.

query: I already extracted the PDF text. Turn it into a proper paper summary report using the standard template.
why: Paper content is already accessible and the task is the report-writing step.

query: Give me a structured memo for this full paper, with page-anchored claims and a one-line verdict.
why: Explicit request for the summary-writing standard this skill owns.

query: Summarize this paper from Page Index and save it under memory/pageindex/summary/.
why: Page Index-specific orchestration should trigger pageindex-summarize-papers instead.

query: Find this citation in Page Index and tell me whether you have the PDF.
why: Paper resolution only; no summarization task yet.

query: Verify whether every page of this paper was read.
why: Coverage verification belongs to a reading workflow, not the summarization skill.

query: Compare these ten papers and write a literature review.
why: Cross-paper synthesis is out of scope.

query: Classify this paper into my taxonomy.
why: Classification is adjacent but outside summarization scope.

query: Just give me the abstract in bullet points.
why: Abstract extraction only is below the intended scope of a full paper summary report.
